oneAccount.title: One Account for Everything
oneAccount.intro: Pado is a self-custodial smart account that unifies spot trading, perpetual futures, prediction markets, lending, and DeFi staking on Nasun — a Move-based L1 blockchain built for DeFi.
oneAccount.problem: Your capital is fragmented across protocols. Stablecoins sit idle. Trading opportunities disappear before you can act.
oneAccount.solution: Unified margin architecture across all products. One balance that earns yield, backs positions, and stays liquid.

whyKorea.title: Global Product, Korea Market Entry
whyKorea.intro: Pado is a global unified onchain finance application. Our regional entry strategy begins with South Korea — one of the world’s most concentrated and active crypto markets.
whyKorea.strategy: Establish a Korean legal entity and obtain VASP registration. Launch with self-custodial spot trading as the compliant entry point — a service Korean traders need and regulators can approve.
whyKorea.regulatory: South Korea ended a nine-year ban on corporate crypto trading in 2026. An estimated $110B in Korean capital moved offshore due to limited domestic options. As regulations evolve, Pado’s full product suite is ready to unlock market by market.
whyKorea.vision: Korea is the first market, not the only market. The same compliance-first playbook — local entity, VASP registration, progressive feature rollout — scales to every jurisdiction where on-chain finance is gaining regulatory clarity.

features.title: Unified Margin
features.description: Cross-collateral margin across spot, perpetuals, and prediction markets — currently unavailable in Korean-focused platforms. Your entire portfolio backs all positions simultaneously.

features.title: Protocol-Level Execution
features.description: Because Nasun controls the consensus layer, conditional orders — take-profit, stop-loss, trailing stops — can execute at the validator level. No keeper bots. No single points of failure.

features.title: Intent-Based Automation
features.description: Set rules, not transactions. AI-integrated intent solvers enable advanced execution strategies. Solvers compete to execute — or your intent reverts.

features.title: Social Trading
features.description: Copy traders with protocol-enforced risk limits. Position-gated groups ensure participants have skin in the game. Prove your track record with zero-knowledge proofs.

modes.title: Safe Mode
modes.label: Default
modes.description: Isolated positions. No leverage. Your collateral backs one thing at a time.

modes.title: Pro Mode
modes.description: Portfolio-level margin. Yield-bearing collateral. One balance across all products.

modes.title: Institutional
modes.description: Custom APIs, position limits, and compliance controls.

liveNow.title: What’s Live Now
liveNow.closing: Built on Nasun: Move-based architecture, parallel execution, atomic transactions, sub-second finality.

flywheel.title: Three Verticals, One Flywheel
flywheel.intro: Pado is not a standalone product. It is the financial engine of the Nasun ecosystem.

items.description: DeFi users already hold NSN and operate on-chain wallets — zero-friction adopters of Gen Sol’s competitive gaming economy.
In-game transactions — NFT mints, tournament entries, marketplace trades — flow back through Pado’s DEX as token demand.
Enterprise clients settle AI inference in stablecoin acquired through Pado. Executors lock NSN in staking tiers, tightening circulating supply.

flywheel.closing: One passkey wallet spans all three products. NSN serves triple duty as trading collateral, in-game currency, and executor stake.

tryPado.title: Try Pado
tryPado.intro: The trading interface is operational. This is not a mockup.

footer.badge: Built on Nasun L1 • Move-based • Self-custodial • Apache 2.0
